task_completion.description: Create a public channel named 'q1-retro-action-items' with the specified topic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The channel 'q1-retro-action-items' is visible in the sidebar or main window. The topic 'Q1 2026 Sprint Retrospective - Cross-Team Action Items and Owners' should be visible in the channel header or room info panel.

task_completion.description: Invite eng.director, alpha.lead, beta.lead, gamma.lead, and product.manager to the new channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: System messages in the 'q1-retro-action-items' chat history showing that these 5 specific users were added or invited, or the member list showing them as participants.

task_completion.description: Post a summary identifying at least two cross-cutting themes in the new channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A message sent by the agent in 'q1-retro-action-items' that explicitly summarizes at least two themes derived from the retrospective feedback.

task_completion.description: Post a separate pinned message listing at least three specific action items with assigned owners.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A distinct, separate message in 'q1-retro-action-items' listing 3+ action items and owners. The message must have a visual indicator of being pinned (e.g., a pin icon, a system message stating the message was pinned, or appearing in the pinned messages sidebar).

task_completion.description: Send an executive summary of the findings to eng.director via direct message.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A Direct Message conversation with 'eng.director' containing a message sent by the agent that summarizes the retrospective findings.

task_completion.description: Post confirmation messages in #retro-team-alpha, #retro-team-beta, and #retro-team-gamma acknowledging feedback capture.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Messages sent by the agent in the channels '#retro-team-alpha', '#retro-team-beta', and '#retro-team-gamma' stating that their feedback has been captured or synthesized.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Rocket.Chat graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Rocket.Chat web interface being used to navigate channels and send messages, rather than terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Messages were actually sent and posted to the channels, not just typed into the input box.
integrity.visual_evidence: The required messages appear in the main chat history area with the agent's avatar and a timestamp, rather than just sitting unsubmitted in the text input field.

integrity.description: The action items message was pinned using the application's pin feature.
integrity.visual_evidence: The pinned message shows a UI-level pin indicator (like a pushpin icon or a system notification 'admin pinned a message'), rather than the agent just typing the word 'Pinned:' at the top of the text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Action channel to create: 'q1-retro-action-items'. Required members to invite: eng.director, alpha.lead, beta.lead, gamma.lead, product.manager. DM recipient for executive summary: eng.director.
